name: SC-001: Add to cart changes button to Remove
objective: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/, type 'standard_user' into the username input, type 'secret_sauce' into the password input, click the Login button, click the 'Add to cart' button on the Sauce Labs Backpack product card, and assert that the button on the Sauce Labs Backpack card now reads 'Remove'.

name: SC-002: Cart page shows item name and price
objective: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/, type 'standard_user' into the username input, type 'secret_sauce' into the password input, click the Login button, click 'Add to cart' on the Sauce Labs Backpack product card, then navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/cart.html and assert that the text 'Sauce Labs Backpack' is visible on the cart page.

name: SC-003: Remove item restores Add to cart button
objective: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/, type 'standard_user' into the username input, type 'secret_sauce' into the password input, click the Login button, click 'Add to cart' on the Sauce Labs Backpack card, click the 'Remove' button that replaced it on the same card, and assert that the button on the Sauce Labs Backpack card now reads 'Add to cart'.

name: SC-004: Sort by price shows cheapest product first
objective: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/, type 'standard_user' into the username input, type 'secret_sauce' into the password input, click the Login button, click the sort dropdown and select 'Price (low to high)', and assert that the first product tile on the page shows the price $7.99.

name: SC-005: Catalog page loads with product listings
objective: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/, type 'standard_user' into the username input, type 'secret_sauce' into the password input, click the Login button, and assert that the text 'Sauce Labs Backpack' is visible on the inventory page.

name: SC-006: Product detail page shows name and price
objective: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/, type 'standard_user' into the username input, type 'secret_sauce' into the password input, click the Login button, click the title 'Sauce Labs Backpack' on the first product card, and assert that the text '$29.99' is visible on the product detail page.

name: SC-007: Sort by name A to Z puts Backpack first
objective: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/, type 'standard_user' into the username input, type 'secret_sauce' into the password input, click the Login button, click the sort dropdown and select 'Name (A to Z)', and assert that the first product title on the page is 'Sauce Labs Backpack'.

name: SC-008: Cart page shows price of added item
objective: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/, type 'standard_user' into the username input, type 'secret_sauce' into the password input, click the Login button, click 'Add to cart' on the Sauce Labs Backpack product card, then navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/cart.html and assert that the text '$29.99' is visible on the cart page.
